shortDescription.text: Confirms the skill's legitimate purpose and absence of malicious intent.

fullDescription.text: This rule identifies and confirms skills that align with their stated purpose, utilize secure coding practices (e.g., environment variables for credentials), and show no indicators of malicious activity such as unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or arbitrary code execution. External threat intelligence is used to corroborate the skill's legitimacy and public availability.

message.text: The initial analysis classified this skill as LIKELY_BENIGN, which has been **confirmed** by external threat intelligence. The skill is a legitimate tool for managing Confluence Cloud spaces via its REST API, as corroborated by its presence on GitHub (https://github.com/01000001-01001110/agent-jira-skills) and LobeHub (https://lobehub.com/bg/skills/01000001-01001110-agent-jira-skills-jira-spaces). No confirmed malicious intent or indicators were found. The skill employs responsible practices for handling credentials (environment variables) and destructive operations (explicit warnings and confirmation suggestions). No suspicious lines were identified in the initial analysis.
